AR1.justification: Routed correctly to observations.md as a descriptive single-source pattern; the action log states purpose ('append dated entry') but does not articulate why observations rather than decisions/followups against the methodology's strict bars.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: No cross-references emitted; nothing to resolve or break.

AR4.justification: ISO-dated section appended cleanly, but re-running on the same day would duplicate the 2026-05-17 header without merging or no-op.
